title: Prosaptia urceolaris
taxonomy: Prosaptia urceolaris is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. It is a type of epiphytic fern, which means it grows on other plants such as trees. The classification of Prosaptia urceolaris is as follows: kingdom Plantae, phylum Pteridophyta, class Polypodiopsida, order Polypodiales, family Polypodiaceae, genus Prosaptia, and species P. urceolaris. The specific classification helps to identify and distinguish this species from other ferns. This classification is based on the fern's physical characteristics and its evolutionary relationships with other plants.
uses: Prosaptia urceolaris is a species of fern native to New Caledonia. Prosaptia urceolaris has been found to possess potential medicinal properties, although it has not been extensively studied.
